notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __igDisplayPhotoModal) titled 'Instagram Post Photo'. Checks if current URL matches 'instagram.com.*/p/'; if so, constructs the media URL and shows a modal with a preview image. target_url is a placeholder post URL that matches the path pattern so the modal should appear even if the post doesn't exist.
